description: Disclosure Package — manages state-specific disclosure requirements, tracks delivery confirmation, handles HOA document collection, and blocks closing when mandatory disclosures are missing.

hard_stops.label: Mandatory Disclosure Missing Block Closing
hard_stops.logic: A state-mandated disclosure document is missing — block closing until all required disclosures are received and acknowledged.

hard_stops.label: Delivery Not Confirmed Block Condition
hard_stops.logic: Disclosure delivery to buyer has not been confirmed — condition remains outstanding.

hard_stops.label: HOA Docs Not Received Block Closing If HOA
hard_stops.logic: Property is in an HOA community and required HOA documents have not been received — block closing.

soft_flags.label: Disclosure Deadline Approaching
soft_flags.logic: Disclosure delivery deadline is approaching — flag for urgency.

soft_flags.label: Additional Disclosure Recommended
soft_flags.logic: Based on property characteristics or jurisdiction, an additional voluntary disclosure is recommended.
